hallucinations.description: Multiple references cite nonexistent 2025 papers with fabricated arXiv IDs (e.g., Ma & Nyarko 2025 arXiv:2511.19803, Wang et al. 2025 arXiv:2511.10721, Li et al. 2025 arXiv:2512.09103, and others). These do not correspond to real publications.
hallucinations.evidence: References section: '1. Ma, S., & Nyarko, J. (2025). Scalable Data Attribution via Forward-Only Test-Time Inference. arXiv:2511.19803.' and similar entries for Wang et al., Li et al., FPEdit, EditMF, FP-VEC, LoRA-FP, etc.

overall_assessment: Hallucinations found: several nonexistent citations to fabricated 2025 papers. Methodology, equations, and experimental results (precision, latency, perplexity) are consistent with the provided implementation code and generated figures.
